_comment_shadowCopy: Shadow copy moves the test DLL into a temp folder, but SQLitePCLRaw probes for e_sqlite3.dll native binary RELATIVE TO that shadow-copied location, where it doesn't exist. Disabling shadow copy keeps the native dll discoverable next to the test bin folder. Note: PowerShellExecutor also probes AppContext.BaseDirectory for ScriptDeck.Bootstrap.ps1, so we WANT AppDomain to stay enabled (default) so BaseDirectory points at the bin folder.
